title: groov e Wireless Optical Mouse - Computer Accessories for Laptops and PCs, Ergonomic Design, 2.4G Wireless Connection, Compact Mouse - Black
features: WIRELESS MOUSE - Upgrade your computing setup with the Groov-e Wireless Mouse and redefine how you work and play; elevate your navigating experience with a touch of modern convenience
PLUG & PLAY - Made to meet the standards of modern convenience, this mouse uses a USB receiver to connect to your PC or laptop; there are no hassles, setups or installs, simply plug and play

ERGONOMIC DESIGN - This computer accessory offers an ergonomic design to provide users with a comfortable and versatile experience for optimal performance, a compact mouse with smooth tracking and scrolling
OPTICAL MOUSE - The mouse features a simple design with a scroll wheel and uses an optical sensor to ensure smooth and accurate tracking on a variety of surfaces for optimal performance

RELIABLE CONNECTION - The computer peripheral uses a 2.4G wireless connection to ensure you have an uninterrupted and reliable connection that avoids any input delays and provides high-speed communication between your PC and the input device
description: From the manufacturer Optical Mouse The mouse has a simple design with a scroll wheel and optical sensor for smooth, accurate tracking on various surfaces. 2.4G Wireless Connection The 2.4G wireless connection offers a stable, cable-free link for smooth communication between your device and computer.
